news.t: XT Exchange Welcomes BTX as It Builds Toward a More Connected Web3 Economy

holdings.infoBox: XT is an equity ETF with a total of 223 individual holdings. The top holdings are Eli Lilly and Company stock at 4.22%, Texas Instruments at 3.93%, Tesla at 3.72%, NVIDIA at 3.70%, and Johnson & Johnson at 3.34%.

overview.description: The iShares Future Exponential Technologies ETF (XT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index that provides exposure to firms from both developed and emerging markets, which create or use future exponential technologies as defined by Morningstar. XT was launched on Mar 19, 2015 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.text: VICTORIA, Seychelles, June 18, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- XT Exchange, a leading global digital asset trading platform, announced the listing of BTXX, the utility token of BTX, in its Innovation Zone. T...
